sections.name: Oratio
lines: O God, Who strengthened blessed Hermes, Your Martyr, with the virtue of steadfastness in his suffering, grant that, emulating him, and out of love for You, we may look upon worldly success as nought and fear no earthly danger.

sections.name: Secreta
lines: We offer You, O Lord, the sacrifice of praise in memory of Your Saints; grant, we beseech You, that what has bestowed glory on them may profit us unto salvation.

sections.name: Postcommunio
lines: Filled with heavenly blessings, O Lord, we beseech Your mercy that, by the intercession of blessed Hermes, Your Martyr, we may experience the saving effects of the rite we humbly perform.
